Hey guys, I'm here to answer some frequently asked questions about pre-workout. So one, how much should I take? This is actually quite an interesting question and is a little more complicated answer than most of the other products. And it is formulated for the product itself in the original packaging to take one serving before you train. So you can take it between 15 and 30 minutes before training and that would be basically when you get in the car, start sipping. And when it comes to modifying the stimulant aspect, you can take one serving. You get a decision tree with three options. One serving of calf is going to get you to basically the equivalent of a big cup of coffee. Two, okay, not as fun as number three, it is basically two cups of coffee. But the third option here is full on Super Saiyan status at nearly 500 milligrams of caffeine. Definitely use that wisely. Do not take more than that because then you would be a silly goose. Okay, next, when should I take this daily versus weekly? Again, excellent question. This product was formulated to last a month because most people are not going to be able to handle more than three intense workouts per week. So you do take this three times weekly and you take it 15 to 30 minutes pre-workout. So if you drive to the gym, that is the perfect time to do it. If you don't drive to the gym, start sipping it when you warm up. How should I take this? Should I take it with food? Honestly, probably not. You're going to be eating a meal probably about 90 minutes before training and you'll still be digesting that meal by the time training comes around. So we're assuming food is in your system already. And the amylase or the carbohydrate enzyme in this product will help further digest the carbohydrates that you do consume in your meal pre-workout. So there's no need to take it with food. And yes, take it with liquid. If you try and consume the powder on its own, it's tough and it gets caught between your teeth and it's pretty gritty. Not recommended. Number four, cycling, stopping or starting. So the beauty of this product is that it's formulated to be taken three times a week and that even when you're consuming stimulants at that rate, your chances of building tolerance are quite low. So if you take it as directed, you should be able to take it continuously as per the instructions at three times a week for an indefinite period. No problem. Lastly, what happens if you skip? That's not a big deal. This is not a cumulative effect in the context of training, so there is absolutely no need to take twice the amount the next time you train. Probably not the most terrible or not the best idea to double up on a tripled caffeine dosage either. So not suggested there. No problem if you skip. Just hop back on next time.
